title: GoldenJoy369: No-Zero Spiral Runtime
description: GoldenJoy369 is an interactive React/Vite prototype and formula framework for the Golden Joy No-Zero Spiral: a PHI369-style creative continuity model for logging creative rounds, sealing essence, tending seeded projects, and returning to work in season.
notes: Claim discipline: this is an original symbolic-operational framework and software runtime prototype. It is not a universal law of nature, a diagnostic tool, or a claim that Fibonacci/phi magically proves destiny.
